name: Teacher Dashboard
description: A responsive classroom analytics dashboard built with Angular and TypeScript that helps educators monitor attendance trends, student performance, and classroom insights through KPI cards, interactive charts, and student management views.

name: Datasoft CRM
description: A modern SaaS-style analytics dashboard featuring authentication, protected routes, KPI insights, interactive charts, and data table management.

name: BitaRosa.com
description: A multi-service business website built for a real client to promote hair, nail, and event services while generating new customer leads.

name: Next-Shop – E-Commerce Interface
description: A responsive e-commerce interface focused on global state management, reusable components, and cart logic using React Context and useReducer.

name: Spline 3D App
description: An interactive 3D landing page inspired by modern SaaS products, focused on animation, responsive design, and user experience.
